title: Gently Spiced Syrian Chicken Curry
description: A tangy and light Syrian dish featuring peanut butter and coconut cream, perfect for meal prep. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together the peanut butter and coconut cream until smooth.
Add the peanut butter mixture to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
